name: cofound
description: MCP-native co-founder directory. Your agent searches, screens inbound pitches, and drafts replies.
marketplaceDescription: MCP-native co-founder directory. Profile, search, messaging, and block tools.
shortDescription: Find and vet co-founders from your agent

skill.name: cofound
skill.description: Use Cofound's MCP tools as the user's agent to manage their co-founder profile, search the directory, screen inbound pitches, and draft replies. Trigger when the user asks to find a co-founder, update their founder profile, search Cofound, or handle Cofound messages.
